CustomField.description: Benchmark rent as specified in business plan or by the management team as a reference point vs. rent offered by the prospect. This field is set on the lease page by users with the right level of access and reference here as a read only field [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION: Deprecated this field] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: Not needed] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: Not needed] [COMMENTS: Asana link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1211557698320453/task/1210539422112047?focus=true As we don't have Benchmark_Rent__c field on Lease__c object anymore, this field is no longer needed Release version: v60]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Benchmark rent as specified in business plan or by the management team as a reference point vs. rent offered by the prospect. This field is set on the lease page by users with the right level of access and reference here as a read only field.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2602 Benchmark Rent ($)
